# Build Path Template

Use this template for all pages in `docs/build_paths/`.

## Summary

- Who this path is for
- What the reader will build
- Estimated prerequisite level

## Minimum Stack

- Hardware
- Operating environment
- Dataset / benchmark
- Simulator
- Frameworks

## Reading Core

- 3-6 papers or project pages

## Execution Plan

- Week 1-2 milestone
- Week 3-4 milestone
- Week 5-8 milestone

## Failure Modes

- The most likely technical mistakes

## Success Check

- What a convincing result looks like

## Next Step

- Which roadmap, map, and resource pages to read next
